text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several days have passed since the spring Tenno
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross regrets provoking Super Creek
with her unsportsmanlike remarks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing this, I learn that Tamamo Cross had
ignited Super Creek's fervor by threatening to
hurt me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hope that Super Creek is able to run her next
race with a calm mind and peaceful heart.
